summary.why: Hooks created deadlock: agent couldn't continue rebase (blocked by pending check) or log (can't commit mid-rebase)
summary.how: Added git.IsInteractiveGitOp() checking .git state files; all hooks early-return during interactive ops

notes: Reviewed by code-reviewer agent which caught two issues: relative gitDir path not resolved against repo root (breaks in non-root CWD), and pending.go checked mid-operation after already running GetPendingCommits. Both fixed before commit.
